regime_fall.current_status: Day 37 of U.S.-Israel-Iran conflict intensifies with major ground force deployments (USS Tripoli, 82nd Airborne) and expanded strikes on Iranian infrastructure (Isfahan, petrochemical plants, near Tehran), while diplomatic deadlock persists amid contradictory signals and severe internal Iranian political fragmentation between moderates and hardliners.
regime_fall.last_major_event: USS Tripoli amphibious assault ship with 3,500 Marines and strike fighters deployed to Middle East on April 4, 2026, signaling potential escalation toward ground operations while Iran fires ballistic missiles at Diego Garcia and faces deepening internal political crisis with hardline IRGC consolidating power.
